allow: PowerShell($item = Get-Item "C:\\Users\\colin\\dev\\booking-SaaS" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($null -ne $item\) { "$\($item.FullName\) | LinkType: $\($item.LinkType\) | Target: $\($item.Target\)" } else { "Does not exist" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 9001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "dcpctrl|dotnet" } | Select-Object Id, Name, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 2916 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq "dotnet" } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Processes killed")
PowerShell($procs = Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "dcpctrl|dotnet" }; Write-Host "Count: $\($procs.Count\)"; $procs | Select-Object Id, Name, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell($pids = \(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "dcpctrl|dotnet" }\).Id; Stop-Process -Id $pids -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host "Killed $\($pids.Count\) processes")

PowerShell(docker exec -e PGPASSWORD='5EkB.7T5yfkN}y~D' postgres-78db10bb psql -U postgres -d account -c "UPDATE subscriptions SET status='Trial', plan='Trial', pay_fast_token=NULL, cancelled_at=NULL, scheduled_plan=NULL, current_period_end=NULL, next_billing_date=NULL WHERE id='sub_01KPZGXR9B3GKSWYM6EPSKNVCW'; DELETE FROM payment_transactions WHERE tenant_id=1497184145489530880;")

PowerShell($logToken = Select-String -Path "C:\\Users\\colin\\dev\\NerovaBookings\\.workspace\\developer-cli\\aspire-apphost.log" -Pattern "login\\?t=\([a-f0-9]+\)" | Select-Object -Last 1; if \($logToken\) { $matches = [regex]::Match\($logToken.Line, 'login\\?t=\([a-f0-9]+\)'\); Write-Host "Latest token: $\($matches.Groups[1].Value\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/requests/http?limit=20" -UseBasicParsing; \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).requests | Select-Object -First 10 @{N='m';E={$_.request.method}}, uri, @{N='status';E={$_.response.status_code}} } catch { Write-Host "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/requests/http?limit=30" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($resp\) { $reqs = \($resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).requests; Write-Host "Total: $\($reqs.Count\)"; $reqs | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.request.method\) $\($_.uri\) -> $\($_.response.status_code\)" } } else { Write-Host "ngrok inspector NOT reachable on 4040" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://215e-169-1-35-95.ngrok-free.app/api/account/subscriptions/payfast/itn" -Method POST -Body "test=1" -ContentType "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop -SkipHttpErrorCheck; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Body: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(200,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "ERR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://215e-169-1-35-95.ngrok-free.app/api/account/subscriptions/payfast/itn" -Method POST -Body "test=1" -ContentType "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(200,$r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $reader = [System.IO.StreamReader]::new\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Body: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\).Substring\(0,500\)\)" } })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name ngrok -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime; Write-Host "---"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:4040/inspect/http" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Inspect: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Not on 4040" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/requests/http?limit=50" -UseBasicParsing; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Count: $\($data.requests.Count\)"; $data.requests | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.request.method\) $\($_.request.uri\) -> $\($_.response.status_code\) at $\($_.start\)" } | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/requests/http?limit=100" -UseBasicParsing; $reqs = \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).requests; Write-Host "Total: $\($reqs.Count\)"; $reqs | ForEach-Object { $ua = ''; if \($_.request.headers.'User-Agent'\) { $ua = $_.request.headers.'User-Agent'[0].Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(40, $_.request.headers.'User-Agent'[0].Length\)\) }; "$\($_.start\) $\($_.request.method\) $\($_.request.uri\) -> $\($_.response.status_code\) UA=$ua" })

PowerShell($conf = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:4040/api/tunnels" -UseBasicParsing; \($conf.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\) | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Select-String -Pattern "addr|verify|inspect|public_url" | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell(docker exec -e PGPASSWORD='5EkB.7T5yfkN}y~D' postgres-78db10bb psql -U postgres -d account -c "SELECT id, status, plan, pay_fast_token, current_period_end FROM subscriptions WHERE pay_fast_token IS NOT NULL;")

PowerShell(docker exec -e PGPASSWORD='5EkB.7T5yfkN}y~D' postgres-78db10bb psql -U postgres -d account -c "SELECT s.id, t.name as tenant, s.status, s.plan, s.scheduled_plan, s.pay_fast_token IS NOT NULL as has_token, s.current_period_start, s.current_period_end FROM subscriptions s JOIN tenants t ON s.tenant_id = t.id;")

PowerShell(docker exec -e PGPASSWORD='5EkB.7T5yfkN}y~D' postgres-78db10bb psql -U postgres -d account -c "SELECT s.id, t.name, jsonb_array_length\(s.payment_transactions\) as txn_count, s.payment_transactions FROM subscriptions s JOIN tenants t ON s.tenant_id = t.id WHERE t.name = 'Nerova Systems';")

PowerShell(docker exec -e PGPASSWORD='5EkB.7T5yfkN}y~D' postgres-78db10bb psql -U postgres -d account -c "SELECT s.id, t.name, t.id as tenant_id, s.status, s.plan, s.scheduled_plan, s.pay_fast_token IS NOT NULL as has_token, s.current_period_end, jsonb_array_length\(s.payment_transactions\) as txn_count FROM subscriptions s JOIN tenants t ON s.tenant_id = t.id ORDER BY s.created_at DESC;")

PowerShell(docker exec -e PGPASSWORD='5EkB.7T5yfkN}y~D' postgres-78db10bb psql -U postgres -d account -c "SELECT id, jsonb_array_length\(payment_transactions\) as count, payment_transactions FROM subscriptions WHERE id = 'sub_01KQ4MAQNJEF1PAVS1DPBPN5RW';")
